sql: SELECT * FROM `inner_loan_order` WHERE  (updated_at>=1779321600 and interest_start_time < 1779408000 and order_status in (4,5,6) )
SELECT * FROM `customer` ORDER BY id desc

select a.order_type,treasury_id,customer_id ,currency,
	sum(amount_now-ifnull(b.repay_principal,0)-ifnull(c.hedged_principal,0)) as holding_amount
	from inner_loan_order a

	left join (select order_id,sum(repay_principal) repay_principal from repay_records where updated_at < 1779408000000 group by order_id) b
	on a.order_id = b.order_id

	left join (select order_id,sum(amount) hedged_principal from hedged_principal_record where updated_at < 1779408000000 group by order_id) c
	on a.order_id = c.order_id

	where ( a.updated_at>=1779321600 and a.interest_start_time < 1779408000 and a.order_status in (4,5,6))
	group by a.order_type,currency,treasury_id,customer_id

SELECT ifnull(sum(a.amount), 0) as sum_val FROM release_records a inner join inner_loan_order b on a.order_id = b.order_id WHERE b.order_type = 1 AND (b.customer_id = '7361657191368118272' and b.treasury_id = '7360522102051590144' and a.currency = 'USDT' and a.occurred_at >= 1779321600 and a.occurred_at < 1779408000)
